comment: 1.20/1.21 only: galena nugget crushes 1:1 to crushed-leadoxide (EM absent). 1.22 renamed this crushed variant to 'galena' (see nugget-crushing-galena.json). Pointing at a crushed variant that doesn't exist on this version leaves CrushedStack unresolved and crashes the handbook, because vanilla GetHeldItemInfo dereferences it without a null-check. The quantity field is likewise REQUIRED: GetHeldItemInfo reads crushingProps.Quantity.avg with no null-check, so omitting it NREs every tooltip (and breaks the pulverizer). The build ships only the matching file per game version.
